title: Mission Report Ep. 03 | Antigravity Updates
summary: Google Antigravity is an agentic development platform that evolves traditional IDEs into an agent-first architecture. It enables developers to manage agents across workspaces for autonomously planning and executing complex, end-to-end software development tasks across editor, terminal, and browser environments.
